explanations.4: getenv('WEBSITE') retrieves an environment variable (a setting stored outside the code) that contains the website's URL to test against.
explanations.14: The dot (.) concatenates strings together, so this builds the full URL by combining the website base with '/blog'.
explanations.20: The ->click() method simulates a user clicking on an element; here it's clicking a link labeled 'Blog'.
explanations.37: The '.DocSearch-Button' is a CSS selector that targets a specific HTML element by its class name so the test can interact with it.
explanations.38: The ->type() method simulates typing text into a form field; here it types 'Bluesky' into the search input.
explanations.45: This clicks on a link with that exact text; the test is checking that such a link exists and can be clicked.
